title: Goat Funded Trader 40% OFF

and duplicate trades or trade ideas across accounts
Martingale / Grid Recovery Systems Strategies that increase lot size after losses (Martingale or grid) are strictly prohibited.
including: Using over 80% of available margin on a single trade.

Traders are strictly prohibited from accessing or operating their account on any shared mobile or desktop device. payout_limits: The first two payouts are capped at 6% of the initial balance
with no limits thereafter. This applies to all programs.
payout_policy.processing_time: Bi-weekly, First payout on demand with add-on
payout_policy.details: Instant Funding Models [Goat & Pro]: Payout Frequency: Bi-weekly, First payout on demand with add-on on the Instant Pro Only. Profit Split: 80%, 100% with Add-on. 1 Step, 2 Step [Goat Standard & Pro] & 3 Step Models: Payout Frequency: Bi-weekly, First payout on demand with add-on. Profit Split: 80%, 100% with Add-on. For the first Reward on Demand with Add-on, the Minimum profitable trading days still applies, a minimum of 3% in profit and a 40% profit split will be applied. After this, traders become eligible for subsequent rewards every 14 at the usual full 80% profit split.

firm_rules.copy_trading: Copy trading of any kind is strictly prohibited. Each account must be traded individually, and traders cannot duplicate trades or trade ideas, whether manually or via EA between accounts at any stage.
firm_rules.expert_advisor: Yes, you can use them as long as the EAs comply with the prohibited trading practices rule. However, you are not allowed to use high-frequency trading (HFT) strategies / systems and/or Gold Arbitrage EA.
firm_rules.inactivity_rule: 30 consecutive days, Inactive accounts within this period are breached
firm_rules.news_trading: News trading is allowed, but trades opened/closed (either manually or automatically, such as via stop loss, take profit, or pending orders) within 2 minutes before or after high-impact news can generate a maximum profit of 1% of the account’s initial balance. Excess profits are removed without penalties. This applies to both challenge and funded phases.

firm_rules.ip_vpn_policy: Standard procedures; Maintain account integrity. Shared Device Usage prohibited.
risk_rules: Funded Traders daily profits are capped at $3
Profits from trades held under 2 minutes on funded accounts are not counted
Risk limit: GFT may impose a 1% risk limit per trade idea if excessive risk-taking is detected.
Goat Guard: Automatically closes all open trades if they reach a 2% loss to prevent excessive drawdowns. This soft breach allows immediate continued trading
with no ban. Triggering it once reduces profit split to 50%; a second time breaches the account fully.
Instant Funding Max Loss Per Trade Rule: Your account will be permanently closed if floating losses reach -2% of your balance at any time.

seo_content:
Goat Funded Trader Technical Infrastructure

Goat Funded Trader, based in Hong Kong, was established in June 2023. It operates as a CFD prop trading firm and offers three program types: Instant, 1 Step, and 2 Steps. Supported trading platforms include MT5, cTrader, Match Trader, TradeLocker, and Volumetrica FX. The firm holds a review score of 4.3 out of 5 based on 546 reviews. Traders can access the firm through a wide range of international payment methods including Apple Pay, Astropay, Credit/Debit Card, Crypto, Google Pay, IMPS, Korapay, Payok, PayPal, Paytiko, and Zen.

The 2-Step Standard program covers seven account sizes from $8,000 to $200,000, with discounted challenge prices ranging from $46.00 (8K) to $587.00 (200K) against original prices of $92.00 to $1,174.00. The Goat variant of the 2-Step program is available in four sizes from $8,000 to $50,000 at lower price points, from $28.00 (8K) to $144.00 (50K). A coupon code (VALENTINE40) delivers 40% off across programs. Instant and 1-Step program configurations are also listed.

Five platforms are supported: MT5, cTrader, Match Trader, TradeLocker, and Volumetrica FX. Tradable instruments span FX, Metals, Indices, Energy, Crypto, Stocks, and Other Commodities. Leverage is up to 1:100 on FX for 1-Step, 2-Step, and 3-Step models (1:50 for Instant); Metals, Indices, and Energy at 1:20 (1:10 for Instant); Crypto at 1:2; and Stocks at 1:5. News trading is permitted, but trades opened or closed within 2 minutes before or after high-impact news events are capped at a maximum profit of 1% of the initial account balance — excess profits are removed without account breach.

The profit split is 80% for all programs, with an optional 100% split available via an add-on. Payout frequency is bi-weekly, with the first payout available on demand with an add-on. The minimum payout is $100. The first two payouts are capped at 6% of the initial balance, with no cap on subsequent payouts. Supported payout methods are Crypto (max $3,000 per payout), Skrill (max $5,000 per payout), and Riseworks. Funded daily profits are capped at $3,000.

Goat Funded Trader prohibits hedging across same or multiple accounts, the use of third-party or off-the-shelf EAs, strategy switching between assessment and funded stages, and duplicate trade ideas across accounts. Martingale and grid recovery systems are strictly prohibited. The Goat Guard feature automatically closes all open trades if floating losses reach 2% of the balance — a first trigger reduces the profit split to 50%, while a second trigger fully breaches the account. Profits from trades held under 2 minutes on funded accounts are not counted while losses still apply. Copy trading is strictly prohibited across all programs.
